subject: Subgrade treatment MM 279.2 - soft zone
question: Soil borings at MM 279.2 NB encountered soft silty clay to a depth of 14 feet below design subgrade elevation. Plan sheets show standard embankment fill but geotechnical report only addresses stable zones. Please provide revised subgrade treatment for this station - options considered include undercut and replace lime stabilization or wick drains. Recommend design revision before earthwork resumes in this section.

subject: Culvert skew angle conflict MM 284.6
question: Plan sheet C-118 shows 60-degree skew CMP culvert at MM 284.6 NB but drainage profile D-84 shows 45-degree skew for same structure. Field conditions confirm 60-degree skew is correct based on natural drainage channel alignment. Please confirm and issue revised drainage profile to avoid conflict.

subject: ADA ramp configuration at US-11 and Maurertown Road
question: VDOT standard drawing AD-1 allows two ramp configurations at this intersection. Existing curb radius conflicts with configuration A. Please confirm which configuration to use and provide direction on curb radius treatment.

subject: Approach slab reinforcement - VA-259 south end
question: Structural plans show #6 rebar at 9-inch spacing for approach slab but geotechnical addendum (issued after bid) calls for additional reinforcement due to micro-pile load transfer. Seeking clarification on whether revised bar size or spacing is needed.
